steps.title: Identify the key relationship
steps.content: The notes establish that ITUC-Africa is a regional federation representing national union federations across Africa, and that it represents the BFTU. The key signal is the representational connection: ITUC-Africa represents the BFTU.

steps.title: Match the relationship to the answer choices
steps.content: Choice B expresses the relationship directly—the BFTU is one of the national federations represented by ITUC-Africa. The other three don't explain the relationship between the organizations—they either describe one organization alone or discuss worker conditions without addressing ITUC-Africa. That matches choice B — B is correct.
